content: Build me a desktop app called Website Generator that lets non-technical users build websites by chatting with AI.
Done! Built a full Electron desktop app with chat interface, live preview panel, and one-click deploy. Supports Claude Code and Codex CLI.
Fix the copy button, settings gear icons, and align copy to bottom of messages.
Fixed all three - SVG via DOM methods, Lucide icon, flex-end alignment.
No dev server confirmation. Port retry spam in chat.
Silenced all intermediate output. Just Preview loading and Preview loaded now.
Historical tool usage not showing from imports.
Fixed chat-store dropping tools field and filtering tool-only messages.
Remove the Electron title bar. Add guided setup wizard for non-technical users.
Frameless window with titleBarOverlay. Full setup wizard with tool install, OAuth auth, profile collection.
Add model selection. Both should default to most powerful.
Model dropdowns in settings. Claude defaults Opus, Codex GPT-5.4. Per-project override.
Need message editing and queueing.
Inline edit with truncate-resend. Queue auto-sends after current response.
Codex CLI changed. Error: unexpected argument --quiet.
Rewrote: codex exec --full-auto --json, stdin prompt, JSONL parsing.
State management is terrible. Concurrent projects dont work.
Per-project state via getPS. Data-first architecture. state.messages as single source of truth.
Duplicates, lost tools, inconsistent UI when switching.
Eliminated appendChat races. Only saveChat (full overwrite). renderMessages always from data.
Deploy button broken. Deploy URL wrong.
Deploy sends chat message to AI. URL detected from AI response, not guessed.
AI speaks too technically. Narrates debugging steps.
Forbidden words list, bad examples, three message max. Rules at top of prompt.
AI has no context about the app it runs inside.
Full environment context in system prompt: auto dev servers, preview, what to do/not do.
Wrangler projects white screen. Preview reloading.
pages_build_output_dir conflict fixed. Dynamic ports. iframe.src comparison fixed.
Rate limits show raw JSON. 529 errors in chat.
API error detection. Amber banner for overloaded/rate limit/500.
Auto-updater broken.
Fixed filename mismatch, blockmap, versionless artifact.
Need drag-drop project reordering. Preview messages cluttering chat.
Drag-drop with persistent order. Status moved to preview panel.
Edit loses images. Sending with image hangs.
Edit preserves attachments with image button. Stdin backpressure fixed with drain event.
AI still narrating. Hard refresh needed for changes.
FORBIDDEN WORDS enforced. PWA service worker disabled in dev.

App is deployed at https://github.com/adventure-gpt/website-generator/releases. Download: https://github.com/adventure-gpt/website-generator/releases/latest/download/Website-Generator-Setup.exe. Current version v1.3.0.
Live and auto-updating via GitHub Releases.

Distribute this app. You must do ALL of these: 1) Make sure the app has auto-update capability via electron-updater. 2) Bump the version number in package.json (increment the patch version from whatever it currently is). 3) Build the Windows installer with electron-builder. 4) Create a GitHub repo (if it does not exist), push the code, tag with the new version, and create a GitHub Release with the installer attached. 5) Create .github/workflows/build.yml that auto-builds for Windows, macOS, and Linux when a tag is pushed, then push it. 6) Build a professional download/landing page and deploy it to Cloudflare Pages. Give me the download page URL and GitHub release URL when done.
Building your distribution now...
and make sure you update the website so that mac and linux get pointed to the new site instead now
Queued — will send after current response
with proper mac and linux download links
Queued — will send after current response

Good, installer built (~86MB). Now let me push code, tag, create the release, and build the landing page.Now I need to also make sure the version is bumped in the package.json (it may have been reverted during rebase). Let me check and also apply the version bump to the electron-builder.yml publish config.Now let me verify the version and the publish config are correct, then push:The git history has large files from earlier commits. Let me clean this up by creating a fresh commit on top of the remote.Good, it's tracked. Let me verify it's in the commit:Now tag and create the release with the installer:Now let me build the landing page and check the CI builds:Good, CI is running. Now let me build the landing page:
